chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-1974 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. 14580/2025. 2. For orders on Misc. 9780/2025. 3. For hearing of Main Case. 22.09.2025 Mr. Rabnawaz, advocate holds brief for Mr. Gulraiz Ahmed Raza, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali, advocate for respondents 2 to 4. Mr. Ahmed Hussain, advocate for respondent 5. Per learned counsel for the respondents the petition is not maintainable as adequate remedy is available to the petitioner under the law. Counsel for respondents further states that question as to maintainability has been raised in this petition from very onset. Counsel for respondents also draws attention that order of this Court, pertaining to bank guarantee etc. have not been complied with by the petitioner. Be that as it may, it appears that counsel was absent on the last date and even today a brief is held for no cogent reason; therefore, petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). Judge Judge M. Khan
